global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design focused on financial clarity.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with an emphasis on clarity and ease of use.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element that appears to be an abstract shape or icon, possibly representing a financial service.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: Another central graphic element, similar in style to the first, likely contributing to the overall theme of clarity and finance.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: A third central graphic element, maintaining the abstract design, enhancing the visual appeal of the ad.

elements.label: Top left graphic
elements.description: A small decorative graphic located at the top left, possibly an icon or logo that adds to the branding.

elements.label: ClearLedge logo
elements.description: The logo 'ClearLedge' displayed prominently at the top, featuring bold typography that stands out against the background.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A large, bold text at the bottom stating 'Your money, clearer' with a smaller tagline 'Fast signup, instant card' underneath.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom with the text 'Start now', designed to encourage user interaction.
